quotes.text: May I take your cloak? No? Very well, commander. The commander is, of course, welcome to continue dripping mud all over the floor that I have spent just this morning polishing.
Who dares attack the steed of the Huntsman?
Perhaps you would rather test yourselves against a more formidable opponent?!
Cowards! Wretches!
Weapons are merely a convenience for a warrior of my skill!
Come Midnight, let's disperse this petty rabble!
Such easy sport!
Amateurs! Do not think you can best me! I kill for a living!
Another trophy to add to my collection!
It was... inevitable.
Always knew... someday I would become... the hunted.
Your behavior will not be tolerated.
Cast out your corrupt thoughts.
Your impurity must be cleansed.
Impure thoughts lead to profane actions.
Ah ah ah...
This is for the best.
Death comes. Will your conscience be clear?
This is who I am. I was tainted from birth, polluted from before my conception, a bad seed grown to bear bitter fruit.
Hello, champions. I've been expecting you.
You're just like the others, aren't you?
A basic spell... but effective.
You grow weaker... I grow stronger!
The inherent nature of fire...
Burn... just like that dragon!
A memory, frozen in time!
Keep still. Let it end.
Winter is here!
I suggest staying put.
It burns, burns, burns!
Just. Gets. Easier.
A fitting end for a thief!
All goes as planned.
The tower needed a new decoration.
You have no idea what it's like to do the things I've done. Harsh things. Necessary things.
Once you get used to it, you can kill friends as easily as anyone else.
I fought it... for as long as... I could...
So... it comes... to this...
Atiesh... will be... splintered...
Karazhan's presence radiates through the Nether... a beacon drawing in the Legion's might.
Our Burning Crusade has consumed countless worlds. This tower will serve as a conduit to each of them.
One battle remains. One final conquest to complete the grand design!
I have foreseen your world's doom!
This tower belongs to the Legion!
Annihilate them!
Begin the barrage!
Incinerate that one!
Take out the target!
Feel the grip of entropy!
Darkness will take you!
Your resistance is misguided. Yield to us!
You will kneel! You will serve!
Enough interruptions! The grand design must be realized.
Preparations are complete. It is time to begin the end!
An infinite army will be brought forth from innumerable worlds!
Behold! The doorway opens to your doom!
Meaningless... and inevitable.
One by one... you fall!
It ends for the mortals, as I saw it would.
The grand design is complete! Every Legion world is now tethered to this tower!
Master! My mission is accomplished! Come forth, and claim this world!
But the design... was flawless...
Could not... foresee... such an end...
